# boxer_token (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth` (Attributes) The authentication details for the external identity. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--auth))
- `identity_provider` (String) The identity provider that the external identity belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `token` (String) The token associated with the external identity.

<a id="nestedatt--auth"></a>
### Nested Schema for `auth`

Required:

- `bearer` (String) The bearer token for the external identity.
